name: fedex-pp-mcp
description: Ship, rate, and track FedEx packages from the terminal — built for small business shippers.

fedex_api_key.title: FEDEX_API_KEY
fedex_api_key.description: Sets FEDEX_API_KEY for the FedEx MCP server. Get a credential from https://developer.fedex.com/api/en-us/get-started.html.

fedex_secret_key.title: FEDEX_SECRET_KEY
fedex_secret_key.description: Sets FEDEX_SECRET_KEY for the FedEx MCP server. Get a credential from https://developer.fedex.com/api/en-us/get-started.html.
